notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran steals (8) 2nd base. Jarren Duran to 3rd. Jarren Duran advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Nick Fortes.

notableEvents.label: Yandy Díaz plunked
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz hit by pitch. Taylor Walls to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
